response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of hands-on fullstack experience, including recent production work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience that directly matches a rare requirement. Demonstrated craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), cloud and container experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), and a strong open-source and teaching track record indicate senior-level engineering and communication skills. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Playwright exposure, though adjacent experience suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: Deep, recent TypeScript/Node.js/React production experience plus AI-agent and MCP development at current role
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, microservices at scale, cloud (AWS) and Kubernetes/Docker
Proven communication and mentorship via workshops, conference talks, and long-running open-source projects
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being the primary backend framework
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated and secondary
Testing expertise centers on D-language tooling and Selenium rather than Vitest/Jest/Playwright specifically
